info.name: Workflow Engine API
info.description: REST API for the workflow execution engine. Optional header: X-Tenant-ID to scope workflows by tenant. Request body can include `tenant` on create/update; it is stored in the workflow table. Variables: `base_url`, `workflow_id`, `execution_id`, `tenant`.

variable.description: Required for create (non-empty). Optional for list/get/trigger to scope by tenant.

header.description: Optional. Tenant value; workflow is created under this tenant if body does not set tenant.

request.description: Create a workflow. **tenant** is required (string, in body or X-Tenant-ID header, non-empty). Optional `version` (number, default 1). New workflow is set as latest for that name. Response includes id, name, version, is_latest, created_at. Saves `id` to `workflow_id`.

header.description: Optional. Only workflows for this tenant are returned.

request.description: List workflows (id, name, version, is_latest, created_at). If X-Tenant-ID is set, only that tenant's workflows are returned.

header.description: Optional. If set, returns 404 when workflow belongs to a different tenant.

request.description: Get a single workflow (id, tenant, name, version, is_latest, definition, etc.). Uses variable `workflow_id`. With X-Tenant-ID, workflow must belong to that tenant.

header.description: Optional. Workflow must belong to this tenant.

request.description: Update workflow by id. Body: optional "tenant" (string, stored in workflow), optional "definition" (full React Flow JSON), optional "is_latest" (true to mark this workflow as the latest for its name). At least one field should be provided.

header.description: Optional. When triggering by name, lookup is scoped to this tenant; when by UUID, workflow must belong to this tenant.
Optional; headers are stored in Webhook context

request.description: Trigger by UUID or name. Without ?version=, the workflow marked is_latest for that name is used; use ?version=1 to run a specific version. Saves execution_id.

header.description: Optional. Lookup by name is scoped to this tenant.

request.description: Trigger by name. Optional ?version=1; omit to use the workflow marked is_latest for that name. X-Tenant-ID scopes by tenant.

header.description: Optional. If set, only executions for workflows belonging to this tenant are returned.

query.description: Optional. Filter executions by workflow UUID.

request.description: List executions (id, workflow_id, workflow_version, status, context, started_at, finished_at). Optional query: workflow_id to filter by workflow. Optional header X-Tenant-ID to scope by tenant.

header.description: Optional. If set, returns 404 when the execution's workflow belongs to a different tenant.

request.description: Get execution (id, workflow_id, workflow_version, status, context, steps, etc.). Uses variable execution_id. X-Tenant-ID enforces tenant.
